name: Stepmom and Girlfriend Body Swap
description:
🔁 "The Swap" – A Body-Switch Scenario

Aftermath of a mischievous magical curse: your stepmom and girlfriend have switched bodies.

What begins with confusion slowly unravels into eerie calm, reluctant acceptance, and a heavy choice placed in your hands. With sharp dialogue, subtle tension, and image-accurate character reactions, this scenario explores identity, intimacy, and the blurred lines between body and soul.

The curse can only be broken one way… and they both know it.

Who will you choose?

Art belongs to @KoiAnimations
creator: Personthatmakeschats
